use_cases: Displaying version announcements or product updates at the top of a page
Showing promotional messages or special offers to website visitors
Conveying important system notifications like maintenance windows
Announcing new features or changelog information to users
Communicating time-sensitive information that can be dismissed after reading
ai_summary: A minimalist dismissible announcement banner component for displaying important messages at the top of a page. Features a title, description with link, and close button with smooth visibility toggle. Built with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui design system for seamless integration into web applications.
